overall.description: A static cinematic view of a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape from a video game, featuring a wide river in the foreground, dense slum housing along the right bank, and towering high-tech skyscrapers with industrial smokestacks in the background. The scene is captured from an elevated fixed position under clear blue skies with warm sunlight illuminating the contrasting architectural styles.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront with industrial district and corporate skyline

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the cityscape from an elevated vantage point overlooking the river

entered.detail: large red steel bridge structure spanning the river with support pillars visible
wide expanse of murky brown water filling the foreground with gentle ripples
dense cluster of low-rise makeshift buildings with colorful rooftops and weathered facades along the waterfront
futuristic high-rise towers with varied architectural designs including glass spires and geometric structures
tall chimneys emitting white smoke plumes rising against the blue sky
small boat-like structures with blue and yellow canopies moored near the slum district

segments.scene_description: A static elevated view captures a futuristic cyberpunk waterfront cityscape. The foreground shows a wide river with murky water, while the right bank features a dense slum district with colorful makeshift housing. In the background, towering corporate skyscrapers rise against a clear blue sky, punctuated by industrial smokestacks emitting white plumes. A large red bridge spans the river on the left, and small floating platforms are visible near the shore.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static elevated perspective of a futuristic cyberpunk waterfront, contrasting gritty urban decay with corporate opulence. It begins by capturing the wide expanse of a murky river in the foreground, where small floating platforms drift near the shore. The view then expands across the right bank to reveal a dense slum district characterized by colorful, makeshift housing. Finally, the scene opens up to the horizon, where towering corporate skyscrapers and industrial smokestacks emitting white plumes rise against a clear blue sky, anchored by a large red bridge spanning the river on the left.
